title: Private Equity Eyes These 3 Fintech Names as Consolidation Accelerates
sentences: Private Equity Eyes These 3 Fintech Names as Consolidation Accelerates Yes, payments fintech is consolidating.

Card networks want more control over card issuance, processors are chasing small-business customers, and private equity is hunting for profitable software companies selling at a massive discount from their 2021 peaks.
Three beaten-down merchant and small and medium-sized business payments names stand out as plausible takeover targets.
Private Equity Eyes These 3 Fintech Names as Consolidation Accelerates
